SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.testing

Class JkTestSelection

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.testing.JkTestSelection
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class JkTestSelection extends Object implements Serializable
Mutable object to specify a set of test to run according class root dirs, file patterns and tags.

By default, when no include/exclude pattern/tag are specified, the selector get all classes under defined class root dirs.

See Also:

  • Field Details

    • MAVEN_INCLUDE_PATTERN

      public static final String MAVEN_INCLUDE_PATTERN
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • IT_PATTERN

      public static final String IT_PATTERN
      A regular expression pattern for selecting integration test classes. The pattern `.*IT` matches test class names ending with "IT".

      Integration tests are tests run within the regular test phase but running slower than regular unit tests.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • E2E_PATTERN

      public static final String E2E_PATTERN
      A regular expression that matches strings beginning with "e2e.".

      This regular expression is commonly used to identify fully qualified end-to-end (E2E) classes that belong to the e2e package.

      End-to-end tests are tests running in e2eTest after the application or library has been packaged.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkTestSelection of()
      Creates an empty testSet The created instance does not include any include filter nor class root dirs so no test will be included out of the box.

    • getTestClassRoots

      public JkPathSequence getTestClassRoots()
      Returns the test class rot dirs to discover the tests from.

    • getIncludePatterns

      public Set<String> getIncludePatterns()
      Returns an unmodifiable set of include classname patterns (ex : ".*IT")

    • addExcludePatterns

      public JkTestSelection addExcludePatterns(String... patterns)
      Adds the specified exclude patterns to the current test selection. Exclude patterns are regular expressions used to filter test class names.

    • getDiscoveryConfigurer

      public JkUnaryOperator<org.junit.platform.launcher.core.LauncherDiscoveryRequestBuilder> getDiscoveryConfigurer()

    • setIncludePatterns

      public JkTestSelection setIncludePatterns(Collection<String> includePatterns)
      Sets the include patterns for selecting test classes. Include patterns are regular expressions used to filter test class names. Only test classes whose names match at least one of the specified patterns will be included.

    • setDiscoveryConfigurer

      public JkTestSelection setDiscoveryConfigurer(JkUnaryOperator<org.junit.platform.launcher.core.LauncherDiscoveryRequestBuilder> discoveryConfigurer)
      Set a native Junit-platform configurer to build the LauncherDiscoveryRequest passed to Junit-platform. The configurer will apply on a builder instance created from patterns, tags and class root dirs defined in this instance. 
           
         setDiscoveryConfigurer(classpath, builder -> builder
                 .filters(
                         ClassNameFilter.includeClassNamePatterns(ClassNameFilter.STANDARD_INCLUDE_PATTERN)
                 )
                 .selectors(DiscoverySelectors.selectMethod("mytest.MyTest#toto"))
                 .configurationParameter("run.it", "false")
         );

    • copy

      public JkTestSelection copy()
